title: Bitcoin is nearing a power law support line Fidelity has tracked since 2015
summary: The group's Dir. of Global Macro Jurien Timmer calls it an accumulation zone but notes the lack of a catalyst to bounce yet.

title: Bitcoin, ether little changed as U.S. launches fresh Iran strikes
summary: The U.S. hit Iran for the third time this week and Tehran has reportedly closed the Strait of Hormuz again.

title: Ripple once weighed shutting down and handing XRP to shareholders, CEO says
summary: Ripple's Brad Garlinghouse says he and co-founder Chris Larsen considered winding the company down and handing its XRP to shareholders before deciding to fight the 2020 lawsuit.

title: Bitcoin’s BIP 110 fork deadline nears with miner support at zero
summary: The BIP 110 proposal would cap arbitrary data on Bitcoin for a year, but Saylor, Adam Back and others say turning a spam dispute into a consensus fight could create a bigger risk than the spam itself.

title: Lending protocol Bonzo loses 77% of value locked as $9 million oracle exploit rattles Hedera
summary: Bonzo Lend lost approximately $9.05 million after an attacker exploited a verification flaw in a third-party Supra oracle contract on the Hedera network.
